title: Carved pupmkin rickroll
description: Resoursepack that plays "Never Gonna Give You Up" inside a carved pumpkin
body:
# What does this resoursepack?
If you equip carved pumpkin it will play the start of "Never gonna give you up" song and will play a gif of Rick Astley on full screen.
![what it does](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6DuEmFQ9/images/ed405decc2b6c8d551ab689505cdcae15c1d7d19.gif)

# **❗❗❗REQUIREMENTS❗❗❗**
**It wouldn't work without [animatica mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica/versions) on fabric [(here is the forge version)](https://modrinth.com/mod/animaticareforged), or OptiFine.**

# IF YOU ARE ON 1.21.7+
The original animatica mod says it works only until 1.21.6, but it's not true and you can use [animatica mod 1.21.5-1.21.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica/version/0.6.1+1.21.5) freely on 1.21.7-1.21.11

# IF YOU ARE ON 26.1+
There comes the alternatives. You should use [animatica refabricated](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/animatica-refabricated). Now only on Curseforge, but some good fork dev (coredex-source) says it is on review on modrinth now.

# Hidden version of resorsepack
Versions of this resorsepack that marked as 1.0.0**b** is a hidden versions. It replaces 
the obvious "RICKROLL!" resoursepack name to "Fixed Sodium Icons🟩".
## 1.0.0a
![1.0.0a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6DuEmFQ9/images/ad09f5f9fb63a6a194cfddc4d44ed7b0ec6de9d2.png)
## 1.0.0b
